content.full_text:
Edward S. Parker
P.O. Box 140
Turlock, Ca. 95384

FPPC
APR 20 11:30 AM '90

Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J. St., Suite 900
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, Ca. 95804

Dear Sir:

I am writing to request information about the laws governing the county elections of non-partisan offices. Assemblyman [illegible] office told me to contact you requesting this information. I am considering running for County office. In the future, I was concerned that I do not violate any laws or regulations.

If you have any brochures or bulletins concerning this matter, I would appreciate receiving them.

I am interested in knowing among everything else:
1. How far in advance of the election can I start raising campaign funds?
2. After I in advance can a candidate start campaigning?
3. Campaign funds and other income reporting. Forms needed?
4. Proper use of campaign funds.

I thank you for your help and assurance in this matter — and wish you good day.

Sincerely, Edward S. Parker

[illegible] & [illegible]

[illegible] O.M. [illegible] O

sections.question:
1; How far in advance of the election can I start raising campaign funds?
2; How far in advance can a candidate starting campaigning?
3; Campaign funds and other income reporting. Forms needed?
4; Proper use of campaign funds.
sections.question_synthetic: The requester seeks general information about California campaign finance and election laws for non-partisan county offices, including timing requirements for fundraising and campaigning, reporting requirements and forms, and proper use of campaign funds.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an incoming request letter from a constituent to FPPC, not an FPPC response/advice letter. The document contains extraneous handwritten Danish text at the end that is unrelated to the FPPC inquiry and appears to be scanning error or document concatenation issue. No formal CONCLUSION section exists. Confidence reduced due to document quality issues and mixed content.

2; How far in advance can a candidate starting campaigning?
3; Campaign funds and other income reporting. Forms needed?
4; Proper use of campaign funds.
